events.title: The Long Northern Reach
events.scene: The Dominion is vast and barely filled — railways pushing west, timber and fur and grain waiting for anyone with the endurance to take them, a border with a richer republic just to the south. The {surname} line can build a fortune from the northern land, run goods across that long border, or use Canada as the patient staging ground for something bigger.
events.researchNote: Place-specific Canadian origins beat (EX-2): the northern resource frontier + Canada as a waypoint to the US. Generic to any canada founding.

choices.text: Build from the northern land — timber, grain, fur, rail
choices.outcome: You wrest a fortune from a hard country. The {surname} line is built on endurance, and it shows in everything the family touches.

choices.text: Run goods across the long border to the richer south
choices.outcome: You learn every crossing and every official's price. The {surname} line profits from the seam between two countries — a useful skill when thirst comes calling.

choices.text: Use Canada as the patient launch pad for a move on the republic
choices.outcome: You build quietly in the north with your eyes fixed south. The {surname} line gathers strength for a leap into a larger arena.

events.title: Two Nations Under One Roof
events.scene: The Dominion is two peoples sharing a country — and the {surname} line must decide whether to bind itself to one community, bridge both, or stand apart and let the divide work for it. In a country built on an uneasy partnership, where a family plants its loyalty shapes every door that opens.
events.researchNote: Canada's founding English/French duality as a distinct social lever for a rising line — alliance, bridging, or opportunistic distance. Place-specific.

choices.text: Bridge both communities — be useful to everyone
choices.outcome: You make the {surname} name a name both sides trust. In a divided country, the bridge collects a toll from all who cross.

choices.text: Bind the line firmly to one community and its loyalties
choices.outcome: You choose a side and are rewarded with its fierce loyalty. The {surname} name is a pillar of its people, and a stranger to the rest.
